Examples.Title: POST /moderate
Examples.Description: Generated from OpenAPI examples.

Examples.Title: Get account details
Examples.Description: Get account details
Examples.Code:
using var client = new ModerationAPIClient(apiKey);
var response = await client.Account.AccountGetAsync();
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using ModerationAPI;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Description: Execute a moderation action on one or more content items.

Examples.Description: Get an action by ID.

Examples.Title: List moderation actions
Examples.Description: List all available moderation actions for the authenticated organization.
Examples.Code:
using var client = new ModerationAPIClient(apiKey);
var response = await client.Actions.ActionsListAsync();
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using ModerationAPI;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Delete an author
Examples.Description: Delete a specific author

Examples.Title: Create a new author
Examples.Description: Create a new author. Typically not needed as authors are created automatically when content is moderated.

Examples.Title: Get author details
Examples.Description: Get detailed information about a specific author including historical data and analysis

Examples.Title: List authors
Examples.Description: Get a paginated list of authors with their activity metrics and reputation
Examples.Code:
using var client = new ModerationAPIClient(apiKey);
var response = await client.Author.AuthorOpenListAuthorsAsync();
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using ModerationAPI;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.
